description: A transportation planner in Bologna needs to evaluate pedestrian accessibility along Via Pasubio. Create a sidewalk-enabled network at ~/SUMO_Output/pasubio_with_sidewalks.net.xml by enabling sidewalk guessing on the existing network at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_buslanes.net.xml. Generate a pedestrian demand file at ~/SUMO_Output/pedestrians.rou.xml containing at least 10 persons walking between valid edges, departing within the first 600 seconds. Configure and run a headless simulation ending at 1800 seconds using a configuration file at ~/SUMO_Output/pedestrian_sim.sumocfg that integrates the new network, the pedestrian routes, and the original vehicle routes and types from /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/ (pasubio.rou.xml and pasubio_vtypes.add.xml). The simulation must produce a trip information report at ~/SUMO_Output/tripinfo_ped.xml including both vehicle and pedestrian data. The SUMO_HOME environment variable is already set to /usr/share/sumo.
